plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-527 RP17.P03.M06.S01-RP17.P04.M03.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-527 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP17 p03 closeout p04 foundation: the full P03 Synthetic Fixture Set, Test And Golden Case Set, Hermes Evidence Packet, Claude Review Packet, and Closeout And Next Handoff cycles, the full P04 Scope Inventory, Contract Draft, and Type And Shape Definition cycles, and the P04 Primary Implementation Slice head (the first eight rows) as nine descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H17), Claude review packet (C17), and CP00-528 handoff, without opening AI governance, model policy, retrieval scope, or citation runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-527 is a descriptor-only RP17 (AI Governance) closeout pack covering 150 units (RP17.P03.M06.S01-RP17.P04.M03.S08). The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly conservative: command-evidence.json declares production_ready=false with status "implementation_and_plan_gates_passed_pending_final_closeout", and the Hermes packet reports only production_ready_candidate=true (gated on coverage.valid && slice.valid). No enterprise-trust claim is made from local validation. Verification: (1) CP527 binding, no-write attestation, requirements, case-set/descriptor (service.js), and coverage/slice/Hermes/Claude/handoff validators (validators.js) are all present; all 7 required public exports exist and are imported+exercised by tests; deliverable (impl 53/contract 21/security_audit 16/test 14/hermes 6/claude 10/ui 28/fixture 2 = 150), micro-title (=150), phase, and micro-phase distributions are internally consistent and match the baseline, plan, and contract. (2) model.test.js validates against the real closeout-pack-plan.json and contract (not hand-built fixtures), asserting coverage validity, descriptor-only rows, authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval=false), and no-write attestation. (3) command-evidence shows npm test, npm run validate, rp17:ai-governance-core:validate, closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/fullplan/goal/control-plane validate, build, and git diff --check all exit 0; readiness auth preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON (not a forbidden auth-failure/0-byte/malformed result). (4) No-write/no-real-data boundaries are truthful: freezeCp527Result + CP527_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION assert ~30 no-write/no-runtime flags, and grep confirms the package src has no writeFileSync/child_process/fetch/network/env side-effects (pure frozen descriptor construction). (5) Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver: allowed_claude_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob]; promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false; claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; the hardened_review_sequence places human finding-adjudication, construction-inspection, and final-closeout validation after the Claude run. (6) Hermes patterns are review-plane only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, PROGRAM_CONTRACT.descriptor_only=true, hermes_packet_body excluded), not product runtime. (7) Review-hardening (CP178+) is enforced: forbidden_review_evidence enumerates failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, disabled_tools_run, missing_raw_output_reference, missing_source_inspection_basis, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, and production_enterprise_trust_claim; validation-report.json confirms forbidden_tools_present=false and summary_only_review_allowed=false with prompt within size limit. (8) Changed-file scope is clean: all in-scope edits are confined to packages/ai-governance (registry/service/validators/test/README), the contract, and the validator script; unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room UI, workbook docs, docx) are correctly classified as unrelated and not attributed to this pack, with no required untracked implementation files omitted. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues found.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-527 ai governance core p03 closeout p04 foundation descriptor pack
